mapper.select: SELECT product_id, name, category, brand, cost_price, selling_price, is_active AS active, created_at, updated_at FROM products WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (name, category, brand, cost_price, selling_price, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{category}, #{brand}, #{costPrice}, #{sellingPrice}, #{active}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET name = #{name}, category = #{category}, brand = #{brand}, cost_price = #{costPrice}, selling_price = #{sellingPrice}, is_active = #{active}, updated_at = GETDATE() WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT v.variant_id, v.product_id, v.color, v.size, v.material, v.sku, v.is_active AS active, p.name AS product_name, p.category, p.brand FROM product_variants v INNER JOIN products p ON p.product_id = v.product_id WHERE v.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY v.variant_id

SELECT v.variant_id, v.product_id, v.color, v.size, v.material, v.sku, v.is_active AS active, p.name AS product_name, p.category, p.brand FROM product_variants v INNER JOIN products p ON p.product_id = v.product_id WHERE v.variant_id = #{variantId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_variants (product_id, color, size, material, sku, is_active) VALUES (#{productId}, #{color}, #{size}, #{material}, #{sku}, #{active})
mapper.update: UPDATE product_variants SET color = #{color}, size = #{size}, material = #{material}, sku = #{sku}, is_active = #{active} WHERE variant_id = #{variantId}
